scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter @shared/types dev" "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:seed: pnpm exec prisma db seed --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.lint: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json frontend/tsconfig.json backend/tsconfig.json shared/package.json shared/tsconfig.json services/pdf-service/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @shared/types build && pnpm --filter backend exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter frontend exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --dir services/pdf-service exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @shared/types build && pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter backend test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @shared/types build && pnpm exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && pnpm --filter backend exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter frontend build
